parameters.query:
WITH location_data AS (
  SELECT
    l.body_id,
    jsonb_agg(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'id',            l.id,
        'source_id',     l.source_id,
        'name',          l.name,
        'location_type', l.location_type,
        'metadata',      l.metadata
      ) ORDER BY l.name
    ) AS locations
  FROM locations l
  WHERE l.body_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY l.body_id
),
body_code_map(datap4k_code, uex_name_origin) AS (
  VALUES
    ('STANTON1',  'Stanton I'),
    ('STANTON1A', 'Stanton I a'),
    ('STANTON1B', 'Stanton I b'),
    ('STANTON1C', 'Stanton I c'),
    ('STANTON1D', 'Stanton I d'),
    ('STANTON2A', 'Stanton II a'),
    ('STANTON2B', 'Stanton II b'),
    ('STANTON2C', 'Stanton II c'),
    ('STANTON3A', 'Stanton III a'),
    ('STANTON3B', 'Stanton III b'),
    ('STANTON4',  'Stanton IV'),
    ('STANTON4A', 'Stanton IV a'),
    ('STANTON4B', 'Stanton IV b'),
    ('STANTON4C', 'Stanton IV c')
),
datap4k_mineables AS (
  SELECT
    bm.uex_name_origin,
    jsonb_build_object(
      'hand_mineables', mn.hand_mineables,
      'ship_mineables', mn.ship_mineables
    ) AS mining_data
  FROM datap4k_mining_norm mn
  JOIN body_code_map bm ON bm.datap4k_code = mn.body
  WHERE mn.section = 'planet-mineables'
)
INSERT INTO entity_display (
  slug, entity_type, name, manufacturer, category, uex_id,
  is_base_variant, payload, search_vector, built_at
)
SELECT
  trim('-' FROM lower(regexp_replace(replace(b.name, '+', ' plus '), '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))),
  b.body_type,
  b.name,
  NULL,
  b.metadata->>'star_system_name',
  (b.metadata->>'id')::integer,
  TRUE,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'name',               b.name,
    'body_type',          b.body_type,
    'code',               b.metadata->>'code',
    'name_origin',        b.metadata->>'name_origin',
    'star_system_name',   b.metadata->>'star_system_name',
    'faction_name',       b.metadata->>'faction_name',
    'jurisdiction_name',  b.metadata->>'jurisdiction_name',
    'orbit_name',         b.metadata->>'orbit_name',
    'planet_name',        b.metadata->>'planet_name',
    'is_available',       (b.metadata->>'is_available')::boolean,
    'is_available_live',  (b.metadata->>'is_available_live')::boolean,
    'is_default',         (b.metadata->>'is_default')::boolean,
    'is_visible',         (b.metadata->>'is_visible')::boolean,
    'source_id',          b.source_id,
    'source_system_id',   b.source_system_id,
    'metadata',           b.metadata,
    'locations',          COALESCE(ld.locations, '[]'::jsonb),
    'datap4k',            dm.mining_data,
    'crossref', CASE WHEN esc.id IS NOT NULL THEN jsonb_build_object(
      'rsi_slug',     esc.rsi_slug,
      'uex_slug',     esc.uex_slug,
      'datap4k_slug', esc.datap4k_slug,
      'source',       esc.source,
      'verified',     esc.verified
    ) ELSE NULL END
  ),
  to_tsvector('english',
    COALESCE(b.name, '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(b.metadata->>'star_system_name', '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(b.metadata->>'orbit_name', '') || ' ' ||
    COALESCE(b.metadata->>'faction_name', '')
  ),
  now()
FROM bodies b
JOIN active_systems s ON s.source_id = concat('star_systems:', b.source_system_id)
LEFT JOIN location_data ld ON ld.body_id = b.id
LEFT JOIN datap4k_mineables dm ON dm.uex_name_origin = b.metadata->>'name_origin'
LEFT JOIN entity_slug_crossref esc ON esc.entity_type = b.body_type
  AND esc.uex_slug = trim('-' FROM lower(regexp_replace(replace(b.name, '+', ' plus '), '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g')))
WHERE (b.metadata->>'is_available')::int = 1
ON CONFLICT (slug, entity_type) DO UPDATE SET
  name            = EXCLUDED.name,
  manufacturer    = EXCLUDED.manufacturer,
  category        = EXCLUDED.category,
  uex_id          = EXCLUDED.uex_id,
  is_base_variant = EXCLUDED.is_base_variant,
  payload         = EXCLUDED.payload,
  search_vector   = EXCLUDED.search_vector,
  built_at        = now()
